questions.question: Which OSI layer is responsible for translating data between application formatting and network encoding?
What is the core responsibility of Layer 4 (Transport Layer) inside connection pipelines?
answers: Logical path selection across separate routing nodes
Mapping human-readable domains to server IP values
End-to-end communication flow control, segmentation, and error checking

questions.question: At which OSI layer do network routers primarily operate to forward packages?
What is the exact Protocol Data Unit (PDU) name processed at Layer 2 of the OSI model?
What type of firewall monitors the state of active connections to determine whether to block a packet?
Which protocol encapsulates web traffic inside an encrypted SSL/TLS session framework layer?
How does Asymmetric Encryption handle session key setup operations?
answers: It hashes password strings using random salt variables
It uses a public key to encrypt data and a matching separate private key to decrypt it
It restricts traffic lanes to specific local MAC configurations
It relies on a single shared symmetric key rotated periodically

questions.question: What is the primary role of a demilitarized zone (DMZ) inside an enterprise network layout?
answers: To isolate public-facing servers from the secure internal private network infrastructure
To balance bandwidth distributions across edge switch routing points
To host local user database management tables securely
To store system application logs data fields away from internet paths

questions.question: How many total bit blocks form a standard IPv4 address structure?
What is the primary role of the Address Resolution Protocol (ARP) inside a subnet?
answers: To forward data packages across different global public networks
To assign dynamic IP configurations automatically
To discover the physical MAC address matching a known logical IP address
